notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Kazuma Okamoto reaches on a fielder's choice. Vladimir Guerrero Jr. to 3rd. Eloy Jiménez to 2nd. Fielding error by shortstop Zach Neto.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Zach Neto steals (3) 3rd base. Mike Trout steals (3) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Jo Adell GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jo Adell grounds into a double play, second baseman Lenyn Sosa to shortstop Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Yoán Moncada out at 2nd. Jo Adell out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nolan Schanuel reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Tyler Heineman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tyler Heineman grounds into a double play, third baseman Yoán Moncada to second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Myles Straw out at 2nd. Tyler Heineman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes singles on a ground ball to left fielder Josh Lowe. Myles Straw scores.

notableEvents.label: Jesús Sánchez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jesús Sánchez grounds out, second baseman Adam Frazier to first baseman Nolan Schanuel.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez flies out to left fielder Josh Lowe.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Nolan Schanuel reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Andrés Giménez.

notableEvents.label: Nathan Lukes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Nathan Lukes grounds out, pitcher Shaun Anderson to first baseman Nolan Schanuel. Myles Straw scores.
